field_expectations.stable_url_or_doi: must be non-empty and contain a DOI or stable URL string
field_expectations.retrieval_date: must be non-empty ISO date text
field_expectations.metric: must name the exact metric and units
field_expectations.dataset: must name the dataset, variant, or profile
field_expectations.split: must name the train/test split, validation protocol, horizon, or run condition
field_expectations.method: must name the external method or observer being compared
field_expectations.reported_value: must be non-empty and traceable to the source row
field_expectations.bsebench_frozen_value: must be non-empty and refer to the frozen BSEBench value being compared
field_expectations.comparability_caveat: must be non-empty for every row, including comparable rows

case_expectations.expected_reason: all required fields are present and comparability is comparable
all required fields are present and caveat explains partial comparability
all required fields are present and caveat explains not-comparable status
stable URL or DOI, retrieval date, dataset, split, reported value, BSEBench frozen value, and caveat are blank
comparable rows still require a non-empty caveat documenting why the comparison is allowed

downstream_gate_expectation: A downstream comparison task is incomplete if any row expected to support comparison lacks a required field, uses an unsupported comparability value, or leaves the caveat blank.
